name: Data Profiling & Statistics
description: Generate comprehensive profile statistics and detect anomalies

config.sql:
SELECT 
  *,
  AVG(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id) as avg_amount,
  MIN(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id) as min_amount,
  MAX(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id) as max_amount,
  STDDEV(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id) as stddev_amount
FROM {{input}}

SELECT *,
  case 
    when abs(amount - avg_amount) > (3 * stddev_amount) then 'outlier'
    else 'normal'
  end as outlier_flag
FROM {{input}}

SELECT 
  'customer_id' as column_name,
  count(*) as total_rows,
  sum(case when customer_id is null then 1 else 0 end) as null_count,
  100.0 * sum(case when customer_id is null then 1 else 0 end) / count(*) as null_percentage
FROM {{input}}
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'amount' as column_name,
  count(*) as total_rows,
  sum(case when amount is null then 1 else 0 end) as null_count,
  100.0 * sum(case when amount is null then 1 else 0 end) / count(*) as null_percentage
FROM {{input}}
